olga.title: 🎶 Olga's Flute
olga.html:
Olga loved music. She played the flute every day after school. She wanted to play in the school concert.

One day, the music teacher said: 'There is a solo in the concert. Who wants to play it?' Olga raised her hand. 'I do!' she said.

Olga practiced every day. She practiced in the morning and in the afternoon. Sometimes her notes were wet because she was so nervous her hands were sweaty!

But Olga didn't give up. She said: 'I will memorize it by Monday morning.' She practiced every day — that's an adverb of time!

On the day of the concert, Olga walked on stage. She took a deep breath and played beautifully. She didn't make a single mistake! Everyone clapped. Olga felt very proud. She already knew she wanted to play again next year.

instruments.title: 🎸 Musical Instruments
instruments.html:
There are many musical instruments. Let's learn about some of them!

The flute makes a sweet, high sound. You blow into it and cover the holes with your fingers. The cork on some instruments helps keep them together.

People have lunch and then go to music class. Some children give a concert at the end of the year. Others make a mistake sometimes, but that's okay — everyone learns!

You can do an art project about music. Draw your favourite instrument! You can also tell a lie about what instrument you play — just kidding! Always be honest.

The best musicians practice every day. They already know their songs by heart. They practice in the morning or in the evening.
